mapper.update: MERGE INTO CMS_MENU_ACCESS a USING dual ON (a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.menu_idx = #{menu_idx} AND a.access_date = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd')) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.access_count = a.access_count+1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, menu_idx, access_date, access_count ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{menu_idx}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyyMMdd'), 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT b.menu_idx, NVL(a.access_count, 0) AS access_count, b.menu_name, level AS menu_level FROM ( SELECT menu_idx, SUM(access_count) AS access_count FROM CMS_MENU_ACCESS WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND TO_DATE(access_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-MM-dd') AND TO_DATE(access_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') <= TO_DATE(#{end_date},'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY menu_idx ) a, ( SELECT menu_idx, group_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_name FROM CMS_MENU WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ) b WHERE a.menu_idx(+) = b.menu_idx CONNECT BY PRIOR b.menu_idx = b.parent_menu_idx START WITH b.parent_menu_idx = 0 ORDER BY group_idx, menu_idx
